content:
<!-- type: changes lang: yaml -->

```yaml
_sdd:
  id: result-backend-changes
  refs:
    - $ref: "#result-backend-async-api"
changes:
  - path: crates/cclab-queue/src/backend/redis.rs
    action: modify
    description: |
      Add 12 tests to existing #[cfg(test)] mod tests:
      - 5 unit tests (R1-R5): config construction, serde roundtrip, TTL computation, Clone
      - 7 integration tests (R6-R12): metadata CRUD, empty batch, custom TTL, state overwrite, delete nonexistent
      Extend existing integration tests with 5 more (R13-R17): get_state/result not found, wait_for_result terminal-no-result edge, set_result state side effect, complex JSON metadata

  - path: crates/cclab-queue/src/backend/ion.rs
    action: modify
    description: |
      Add 18 tests to existing #[cfg(test)] mod tests:
      - 5 unit tests (I1-I5): config construction, default TTL, value_to_bytes for Bytes/String/unexpected variants
      - 13 integration tests (I6-I18): full CRUD lifecycle, batch ops, wait_for_result success/timeout, health check, metadata CRUD, state side effect, not-found edges
```
